explanation: SCI-FI is defined here, playfully, as "A.I. fics circulating endlessly". Also, AIFICS circulating (reversed = SCIFIA) endlessly (without the final letter = SCIFI), gives SCI-FI!
hints: Here, the whole thing is the wordplay, and the whole thing is the definition.
We also need to present this reversed phrase "endlessly".
What (3-2) phrase could playfully be defined as "A.I. fics circulating endlessly"?
